title: Memoria Blueprint
description: Schema for Memoria workspace blueprint definition files.

name.description: Human-readable display name shown in the QuickPick.

description.description: Short description of the blueprint's purpose.

workspace.description: Top-level workspace entries to scaffold. Folder names must end with '/'.

features.description: Blueprint features such as Explorer decorations. Each entry must have a known feature id.

name.description: Entry name. Append '/' to denote a folder (e.g. '00-ToDo/'). Files must not have children.

featureEntry.description: A blueprint feature entry. Additional properties depend on the feature id.

description.description: Short description of what the feature provides.

enabledByDefault.description: Whether the feature is enabled when the blueprint is first applied.

rules.description: Decoration rules applied to workspace entries.

filter.description: Path substring matched against workspace-relative paths to select decorated entries.

badge.description: Short badge text (1–2 characters) shown on the file decoration.

tooltip.description: Hover tooltip text shown for the decorated item in the Explorer.

propagate.description: When true, children of the decorated folder inherit the decoration. Only applies to folder-name filters (e.g. 'FolderName/'). Defaults to false.
